EDITPERSON.label: Persons & Families - add/edit
EDITPERSON.description: Add, edit, and delete person records. Edit families. Move members between families. Bulk-update persons and group membership.

SENDSMS.label: SMS/Mailchimp - send
SENDSMS.description: Send SMS messages to individuals or groups. Check SMS balance. Cancel pending sends.

VIEWSMS.label: SMS - view all
VIEWSMS.description: View the Persons → Messages page. See **all** SMS history across all users. Without this permission, users can still send SMS (with SENDSMS) and see the status of their own sends, but cannot browse the full SMS log.

RUNREPORT.label: Reports - run reports & view stats
RUNREPORT.description: Run person/family reports and view statistics.

MANAGEREPORTS.label: Reports - save shared reports
MANAGEREPORTS.description: Save **shared** reports (available to all users). Without this, users can still run reports and save personal reports. Includes RUNREPORT.

VIEWMYNOTES.label: Notes - view & edit notes assigned to me
VIEWMYNOTES.description: View notes that you created or that are assigned to you.

VIEWNOTE.label: Notes - view all
VIEWNOTE.description: View all notes across all people and families. Includes VIEWMYNOTES.

EDITNOTE.label: Notes - add/edit all
EDITNOTE.description: Create, edit, and assign notes. Includes VIEWNOTE.

BULKNOTE.label: Notes - bulk-assign
BULKNOTE.description: Create a note on multiple people at once. Includes EDITNOTE.

VIEWATTENDANCE.label: Attendance - view and report
VIEWATTENDANCE.description: View attendance records, check-in logs, and attendance statistics.

EDITATTENDANCE.label: Attendance - record
EDITATTENDANCE.description: Record and edit attendance. Includes VIEWATTENDANCE.

EDITGROUP.label: Groups - add/edit/delete
EDITGROUP.description: Create, edit, and delete groups. Add and remove members.

MANAGEGROUPCATS.label: Groups - manage categories
MANAGEGROUPCATS.description: Manage group categories (e.g. "Ministry Teams", "Bible Study"). Includes EDITGROUP.

EDITROSTER.label: Rosters - edit assignments
EDITROSTER.description: Edit roster assignments and record planned absences. Includes VIEWROSTER.

MANAGEROSTERS.label: Rosters - manage roles & views
MANAGEROSTERS.description: Define roster roles and views. Includes EDITROSTER.

EDITSERVICE.label: Services - edit individual
EDITSERVICE.description: Edit service details and add/remove service components. Includes VIEWSERVICE. Note: the service-details editing portion also requires the SERVICEDETAILS feature flag.

BULKSERVICE.label: Services - edit service schedule
BULKSERVICE.description: Bulk-edit service runs (e.g. change all services in a quarter at once). Includes EDITSERVICE.

SERVICECOMPS.label: Services - manage component library
SERVICECOMPS.description: Manage the component library (song list, Bible readings, etc.). Includes EDITSERVICE.

EDITDOC.label: Documents & Folders - add/edit/delete
EDITDOC.description: Upload, edit, and delete documents. Includes VIEWDOC.

SERVICEDOC.label: Service Documents - generate
SERVICEDOC.description: Generate service documents (handouts, run sheets). Includes EDITDOC.

SYSADMIN.label: SysAdmin - manage user accounts, congregations etc
SYSADMIN.description: Full system access: manage user accounts, congregations, custom fields, note templates, action plans, system configuration, upgrades, imports, and permanently delete people and families. Includes **all** permissions above.

Service Details.note: Also gates the service-details editing portion of EDITSERVICE.
